items.label: text
items.text: The Alfa Laval LKH Centrifugal Pump is a premium pump for use in hygienic applications. To increase process productivity, it is distinguished by high efficiency, gentle product treatment, chemical resistance, and a wide range of flow rates, pressures and options.

items.label: text
items.text: Precision-engineered, the LKH pump delivers greater energy efficiency than similar pumps. Its optimized design, premium motor, tight tolerances and advanced impeller design minimize recirculation and reduce energy consumption.

items.label: text
items.text: Designed for Cleaning-in-Place (CIP), the Alfa Laval LKH is ideal for hygienic applications within the dairy, food, beverage and personal care industries that require gentle product treatment and reliable operation.

items.label: text
items.text: The LKH pump is available in 13 sizes to handle capacities up to 500 m3/hour and differential pressures up to 11 bar at 50 Hz.

items.label: list_item
items.text: Energy efficient: superior efficiency resulting in reduced energy consumption and CO2 footprint.

items.label: text
items.text: or a double mechanical shaft seal. The front-loading shaft seal, with the spring and washers mounted on the atmospheric side, makes maintenance fast, easy and inexpensive. It takes just a few minutes to replace the shaft seal. In addition, the balanced design minimizes the risk of seal opening during unforeseen pressure shock.

items.label: list_item
items.text: Hygienic: designed according to the most stringent hygienic design standards and with verified, effective CIP cleanability.

items.label: list_item
items.text: Wide performance envelope: reduce need for parallel and serial pump installations and ensure pump operating with high efficiency.

items.label: list_item
items.text: Maximized uptime and reduced maintenance costs: robust mechanical design and ease of maintenance with modular front-loading seals.

items.label: text
items.text: All media contacting steel components like pump casing, impeller, impeller nut and backplate are in W. 1.4404 (AISI 316L). A stainless steel shroud protects the motor and four adjustable stainless steel legs support the complete unit.

items.label: text
items.text: A compression coupling securely attaches the stub shaft to the motor shaft with precision alignment, and the semi-open impeller with a special vane design ensures efficient and gentle handling of the product as it moves through the pump.

items.label: text
items.text: As standard, the LKH pump is equipped with a single mechanical shaft seal but is also available with a single flushed

items.label: text
items.text: Foot-flanged motor according to the IEC metric standard, 2 poles = 3000/3600 rpm at 50/60 Hz, 4 poles = 1500/1800 rpm at 50/60 Hz, IP 55 (with drain hole with labyrinth plug), insulation class F.

items.label: text
items.text: Extended 3-years warranty on LKH pumps. The warranty covers all non wear parts on the condition that genuine Alfa Laval Spare Parts are used.

cells.text: Flush housing sterilization (pump not in operation):
Connections for flushed and double mechanical shaft seal

items.label: footnote
items.text: 1  Possible to reduce dimension F by min. 59 mm for all pump models. For smaller models it will be possible to reduce dimension F even further.

items.label: text
items.text: From LKH-5 to LKH-85 dimensional data are based on 2 pole, ABB motors.

items.label: text
items.text: For LKH-90 dimensional data are based on 4 pole, ABB motors.

items.label: footnote
items.text: 2  Other dimensions available on request. ESE00263/7

items.label: list_item
items.text: Rotating seal face of Silicon Carbide.

items.label: list_item
items.text: Product wetted elastomers NBR, FPM or FEP.

items.label: list_item
items.text: Product wetted surface finish mechanically polished to Ra ≤ 0.8 µm.

items.label: list_item
items.text: Surface finish measurement with certificate (Ra ≤ 0.8 µm).

items.label: list_item
items.text: Motor for other voltage and/or frequency.

items.label: list_item
items.text: Motor with increased safety/flame proof motor.
